phases.name: Documentation Update
phases.description: Add test requirements section to docs/ARCHITECTURE.md

phases.name: Foundation — common + enums + Cargo.toml
phases.description: Add dependencies to Cargo.toml, implement common/mod.rs (base64 encode/decode), and define all 12 enums in types/enums.rs

phases.name: types module core — traits, structs, Class enum, visitor/transformer, descend
phases.description: Implement all 38 concrete structs, Class enum, visitor/transformer traits, type guards, and descend/descend_once iterators

phases.name: constants + stringification
phases.description: Implement 13 constant HashSets in constants/mod.rs and enum<->string conversion functions in stringification/mod.rs

phases.name: jsonization
phases.description: Implement JSON serialization and deserialization for all AAS types

phases.name: Testing
phases.description: Implement all Rust tests satisfying the corresponding TypeScript test suite

phases.name: Test Coverage Gap — Phase 1: Common helpers
phases.description: Add find_immediate_subdirectories and load_golden_text helpers to tests/common/mod.rs

phases.name: Test Coverage Gap — Phase 2: Jsonization error validation
phases.description: Rewrite invalid_test and unserializable_test in test_jsonization_concrete_classes.rs to compare against golden files

phases.name: Test Coverage Gap — Phase 3: Types casts completion
phases.description: Add all 38 cast tests to test_types_casts.rs using exhaustive macro (currently only 12 of 38)

phases.name: Test Coverage Gap — Phase 4: Types overXOrEmpty completion
phases.description: Add ~80 missing over_x_or_empty tests to test_types_over_x_or_empty.rs using macros (currently only 28 of ~111)
